haftalar.kazanim: E6.1.1 — Daily routines and present simple
haftalar.kazanimDetay: Students describe daily routines and lifestyles using present simple.
Students compare different lifestyles using comparatives and superlatives.
Students talk about food preferences and eating habits.
Students use countable/uncountable nouns with how much/how many.
Students make and respond to invitations using going to and will.

haftalar.kazanim: E6.3.2 — Expressing preferences and making suggestions
haftalar.kazanimDetay: Students make suggestions and express preferences about activities.
Students discuss types of communication and technology.

haftalar.kazanim: E6.4.2 — Present continuous vs present simple
haftalar.kazanimDetay: Students distinguish and use present continuous vs present simple.
Students describe their school timetable and favourite subjects.

haftalar.kazanim: E6.5.2 — Obligation and necessity: must/have to
haftalar.kazanimDetay: Students use must/have to to talk about school rules.
Students describe various occupations and discuss career aspirations.

haftalar.kazanim: E6.6.2 — Talking about future plans: will/won't
haftalar.kazanimDetay: Students use will/won't to talk about career goals and future plans.
Students describe weather conditions and discuss climate.
Students describe activities in different seasons.
Students narrate adventure stories using past simple.
Students use time connectors to sequence events in a narrative.
Students use scientific vocabulary to describe simple experiments.

haftalar.kazanim: E6.9.2 — How things work: passive voice introduction
haftalar.kazanimDetay: Students use simple passive constructions to describe how things work.
Students discuss sports using play/do/go and give opinions.
Students describe sporting achievements using past simple and superlatives.
Review of present simple, continuous, past simple and modal verbs.

Comprehensive review of all units.
